Title: Kristeller, Paul
Subject Area: German (culture, style, period)|graphic arts|Italian (culture or style)
Overview: Scholar of Italian and German graphics. He is no relation to the Columbia University scholar of the Italian renaissance, Paul Oskar Kristeller (1905-1999).
Selected Bibliography: Die Apokalypse: älteste Blockbuchausgabe in Lichtdrucknachbildung. Berlin: B. Cassirer, 1916; Holzschnitte im Königl. Kupferstichkabinett zu Berlin. 2nd series. Berlin: B. Cassirer, 1915; Das Werk des Jacopo de' Barbari. Berlin: Amsler & Ruthardt, 1896, English, Engravings and Woodcuts by Jacopo de' Barbari. Berlin: Reichsdruckerei, 1896; and Strong, Arthur, ed. Andrea Mantegna. London: Longmans, Green and Co., 1901; Early Florentine Woodcuts: with an Annotated List of Florentine Illustrated Books. London: K. Paul, Trench, Trübner, 1897; Kupferstich und Holzschnitt in vier Jahrhunderten. Berlin: B. Cassirer, 1905; Die lombardische Graphik der Renaissance. Berlin: B. Cassirer, 1913.
